name: MONA EL ISA

name: JOHANNES KERN

Frankencoin's peg is only as good as the assumptions baked in at launch. FP Block built Kolme for teams making that kind of irreversible architectural commitment, where ownership of the execution environment is the only real safety net. name: DMH

name: ANTHONY CARAVELLO
